function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1) { not forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x2 = x1 or x0(x2) != x0(x1) } or lib(functions).is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x2 = x1 or x0(x2) != x0(x1) } = lib(functions).is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1) { not lib(functions).is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) or forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x2 = x1 or x0(x2) != x0(x1) } = true } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0) { not lib(functions).is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) or forall(x2: T0) { x1 = x2 or x0(x1) != x0(x2) } = true } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0 -> T1) { not (x0 != x1 and x2(x0) = x2(x1)) or not lib(functions).is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x2) } }

function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace] { forall(x0: Set[lib(sum_type).Sum[T0, T1]] -> Bool) { not forall(x1: Set[lib(sum_type).Sum[T0, T1]]) { not x0(x1) or lib(topological_space).is_open_in_sum[T0, T1](x1) } or lib(topological_space).is_open_in_sum[T0, T1](lib(topological_space).big_union[lib(sum_type).Sum[T0, T1]](x0)) } }
function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T1 -> T2) { x0 != x1 or lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x2, x0) = lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x2, x1) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T1 -> T2) { exists(k0: T0) { x0(k0) != x1(k0) } or lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x2, x0) = lib(functions).compose[T0, T1, T2](x2, x1) } }
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { lib(list).is_interval_bound[T0](lib(list).List.singleton[T0](x0), x1, x2) = lib(order).closed_interval[T0](x1, x2, x0) } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1) { not lib(functions).is_bijection_fn[T0, T1](x0) or x0 != x1 or lib(functions).is_bijection_fn[T0, T1](x1) } }
function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1) { x0 != x1 or lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x0) = lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x1) } }
function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1) { exists(k0: T0) { x0(k0) != x1(k0) } or lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x0) = lib(functions).compose[T2, T0, T1](x1) } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> Set[T1], x1: T0 -> Set[T1]) { not forall(x2: T0) { x0(x2) ⊂ x1(x2) } or lib(set).indexed_union[T1, T0](x0) ⊂ lib(set).indexed_union[T1, T0](x1) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x2 ∈ lib(set).equivalence_class[T0](x0, x1) = x0(x1, x2) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0 -> T1) { not lib(relation_transport).respects_function[T0, T1](x0, x1) or x1 != x2 or lib(relation_transport).respects_function[T0, T1](x0, x2) } }

function[T0: lib(functions).Inhabited, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Set[T1], x2: T2 -> Set[T0]) { not lib(functions).is_bijection_fn[T0, T1](x0) or forall(x3: T2) { x1 ⊂ lib(set_lattice).set_image_family[T0, T1, T2](x2, x0, x3) } = x1 ⊂ lib(set).set_image[T0, T1](lib(set_lattice).set_sInf[T0, T2](x2), x0) } }

function[T0, T1, T2: lib(functions).Inhabited] { forall(x0: Set[T1], x1: T0 -> Set[T2], x2: T2 -> T1) { not forall(x3: T0) { x0 ⊂ lib(set_lattice).set_image_family[T2, T1, T0](x1, x2, x3) } or not lib(functions).is_bijection_fn[T2, T1](x2) or x0 ⊂ lib(set).set_image[T2, T1](lib(set_lattice).set_sInf[T2, T0](x1), x2) } }

function[T0: lib(functions).Inhabited, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Set[T1], x2: T2 -> Set[T0]) { not lib(functions).is_bijection_fn[T0, T1](x0) or exists(k0: T2) { not x1 ⊂ lib(set_lattice).set_image_family[T0, T1, T2](x2, x0, k0) } or x1 ⊂ lib(set).set_image[T0, T1](lib(set_lattice).set_sInf[T0, T2](x2), x0) } }

function[T0, T1: lib(functions).Inhabited, T2] { forall(x0: Set[T0], x1: T2 -> Set[T1], x2: T1 -> T0) { not x0 ⊂ lib(set).set_image[T1, T0](lib(set_lattice).set_sInf[T1, T2](x1), x2) or not lib(functions).is_bijection_fn[T1, T0](x2) or forall(x3: T2) { x0 ⊂ lib(set_lattice).set_image_family[T1, T0, T2](x1, x2, x3) } = true } }

function[T0, T1: lib(functions).Inhabited, T2] { forall(x0: Set[T0], x1: T2 -> Set[T1], x2: T1 -> T0, x3: T2) { not x0 ⊂ lib(set).set_image[T1, T0](lib(set_lattice).set_sInf[T1, T2](x1), x2) or not lib(functions).is_bijection_fn[T1, T0](x2) or x0 ⊂ lib(set_lattice).set_image_family[T1, T0, T2](x1, x2, x3) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> Set[T1], x1: T0 -> Set[T1], x2: T2 -> Set[T1], x3: T2 -> Set[T1]) { not forall(x4: T0) { x0(x4) ⊂ x1(x4) } or not forall(x5: T2) { x2(x5) ⊂ x3(x5) } or lib(set_lattice).set_sSup[T1, lib(pair).Pair[T0, T2]](lib(set_lattice).set_pair_family[T1, T0, T2](lib(set_lattice).set_inf_product_family[T1, T0, T2](x0, x2))) ⊂ lib(set_lattice).set_sSup[T1, lib(pair).Pair[T0, T2]](lib(set_lattice).set_pair_family[T1, T0, T2](lib(set_lattice).set_inf_product_family[T1, T0, T2](x1, x3))) } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> Set[T1], x1: T0 -> Set[T1], x2: T2 -> Set[T1], x3: T2 -> Set[T1]) { not forall(x4: T0) { x0(x4) ⊂ x1(x4) } or lib(set_lattice).set_sSup[T1, lib(pair).Pair[T0, T2]](lib(set_lattice).set_pair_family[T1, T0, T2](lib(set_lattice).set_inf_product_family[T1, T0, T2](x0, x2))) ⊂ lib(set_lattice).set_sSup[T1, lib(pair).Pair[T0, T2]](lib(set_lattice).set_pair_family[T1, T0, T2](lib(set_lattice).set_inf_product_family[T1, T0, T2](x1, x3))) or exists(k0: T2) { not x2(k0) ⊂ x3(k0) } } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> Set[T1], x1: T0 -> Set[T1], x2: T2 -> Set[T1], x3: T2 -> Set[T1]) { not forall(x4: T0) { x0(x4) ⊂ x1(x4) } or lib(set_lattice).set_sSup[T1, lib(pair).Pair[T2, T0]](lib(set_lattice).set_pair_family[T1, T2, T0](lib(set_lattice).set_inf_product_family[T1, T2, T0](x2, x0))) ⊂ lib(set_lattice).set_sSup[T1, lib(pair).Pair[T2, T0]](lib(set_lattice).set_pair_family[T1, T2, T0](lib(set_lattice).set_inf_product_family[T1, T2, T0](x3, x1))) or exists(k0: T2) { not x2(k0) ⊂ x3(k0) } } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: (T0, T1) -> Set[T2], x1: Set[T2]) { not forall(x2: T0, x3: T1) { x0(x2, x3) ⊂ x1 } or lib(set_lattice).set_sSup[T2, lib(pair).Pair[T0, T1]](lib(set_lattice).set_pair_family[T2, T0, T1](x0)) ⊂ x1 } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: (T0, T1) -> Set[T2], x1: Set[T2]) { forall(x2: T0, x3: T1) { x0(x2, x3) ⊂ x1 } = lib(set_lattice).set_sSup[T2, lib(pair).Pair[T0, T1]](lib(set_lattice).set_pair_family[T2, T0, T1](x0)) ⊂ x1 } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: (T1, T2) -> Set[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { not lib(set_lattice).set_sSup[T0, lib(pair).Pair[T1, T2]](lib(set_lattice).set_pair_family[T0, T1, T2](x0)) ⊂ x1 or forall(x2: T1, x3: T2) { x0(x2, x3) ⊂ x1 } = true } }

function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: (T1, T2) -> Set[T0], x1: Set[T0], x2: T1) { not lib(set_lattice).set_sSup[T0, lib(pair).Pair[T1, T2]](lib(set_lattice).set_pair_family[T0, T1, T2](x0)) ⊂ x1 or forall(x3: T2) { x0(x2, x3) ⊂ x1 } = true } }
function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T2, x2: T1 -> T2, x3: T1) { not lib(functions).is_surjective_fn[T0, T1](x0) or x1 != x2 or x1(x3) = x2(x3) } }
function[T0, T1, T2] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T2, x2: T1 -> T2, x3: T1) { not lib(functions).is_surjective_fn[T0, T1](x0) or exists(k0: T1) { x1(k0) != x2(k0) } or x1(x3) = x2(x3) } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: Set[T0], x1: T0 -> T1, x2: Set[T1]) { not x0 ⊂ set_preimage[T0, T1](x1, x2) or lib(set).set_image[T0, T1](x0, x1) ⊂ x2 } }
function[T0: lib(lattice).MeetSemilattice] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 <= lib(list).list_inf[T0](x1, lib(list).List.cons[T0](x2, lib(list).List.nil[T0])) = (x0 <= x1 and x0 <= x2) } }
function[T0: lib(lattice).MeetSemilattice] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0 <= lib(list).list_inf[T0](x1, lib(list).List.cons[T0](x2, lib(list).List.nil[T0])) or (x0 <= x1 and x0 <= x2) } }
function[T0: lib(lattice).MeetSemilattice] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not (x0 <= x1 and x0 <= x2) or x0 <= lib(list).list_inf[T0](x1, lib(list).List.cons[T0](x2, lib(list).List.nil[T0])) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T0, x2: T1 -> T1, x3: T0 -> T0) { not lib(relation_transport).preserves_unary_op[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) or x1 != x3 or lib(relation_transport).preserves_unary_op[T0, T1](x0, x3, x2) } }

function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: (T0, T0) -> T0, x2: (T0, T0) -> T0) { not lib(relation_transport).respects_binary_op[T0](x0, x1) or x1 != x2 or lib(relation_transport).respects_binary_op[T0](x0, x2) } }
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T0) { not forall(x2: T0) { x0 <= x2 = x1 <= x2 } or x0 = x1 } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: T0 -> T0) { lib(functions).is_surjective[T0](x0) = lib(functions).is_surjective_fn[T0, T0](x0) } }
function[T0: TopologicalSpace] { forall(x0: Set[T0], x1: T0) { lib(topological_space).Subspace[T0, x0].constraint(x1) = x1 ∈ x0 } }
function[T0: TopologicalSpace] { forall(x0: Set[T0]) { not forall(x1: T0) { x1 ∈ lib(topological_space).closure[T0](x0) } or lib(topological_space).is_dense[T0](x0) } }

function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { (lib(relation_basic).is_reflexive[T0](x0) and lib(relation_basic).is_symmetric[T0](x0) and lib(relation_basic).is_transitive[T0](x0)) = lib(relation_basic).is_equivalence[T0](x0) } }

function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { not (lib(relation_basic).is_reflexive[T0](x0) and lib(relation_basic).is_symmetric[T0](x0) and lib(relation_basic).is_transitive[T0](x0)) or lib(relation_basic).is_equivalence[T0](x0) } }

function[T0] { forall(x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { not lib(relation_basic).is_equivalence[T0](x0) or (lib(relation_basic).is_reflexive[T0](x0) and lib(relation_basic).is_symmetric[T0](x0) and lib(relation_basic).is_transitive[T0](x0)) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x2: (T1, T1) -> Bool, x3: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x4: (T1, T1) -> Bool) { not lib(relation_transport).respects_equivalence[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) or x1 != x3 or x2 != x4 or lib(relation_transport).respects_equivalence[T0, T1](x0, x3, x4) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x2: (T1, T1) -> Bool, x3: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x4: (T1, T1) -> Bool) { not lib(relation_transport).respects_equivalence[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) or x1 != x3 or exists(k0: T1) { x2(k0) != x4(k0) } or lib(relation_transport).respects_equivalence[T0, T1](x0, x3, x4) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x2: (T1, T1) -> Bool, x3: (T1, T1) -> Bool, x4: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { not lib(relation_transport).respects_equivalence[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) or x2 != x3 or exists(k0: T0) { x1(k0) != x4(k0) } or lib(relation_transport).respects_equivalence[T0, T1](x0, x4, x3) } }
function[T0: lib(semiring).Semiring] { T0.0 != T0.1 or forall(x0: T0) { T0.0 = x0 } = true }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: lib(list).List[T0], x1: T0 -> Set[T1], x2: Set[T1]) { forall(x3: T0) { not x3 ∈ x0 or x1(x3) ⊂ x2 } = lib(set_lattice).set_list_sSup[T1, T0](x0, x1) ⊂ x2 } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: lib(list).List[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0 -> Set[T1]) { not x1 ∈ x0 or x2(x1) ⊂ lib(set_lattice).set_list_sSup[T1, T0](x0, x2) } }

function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: lib(list).List[T0], x1: T0 -> Set[T1], x2: Set[T1]) { forall(x3: T0) { not x3 ∈ x0 or x1(x3) ⊂ lib(set_lattice).set_list_sSup[T1, T0](x0, x1) } and lib(set_lattice).set_list_sSup[T1, T0](x0, x1) ⊂ x2 = forall(x4: T0) { not x4 ∈ x0 or x1(x4) ⊂ x2 } } }
function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: lib(list).List[T0], x1: T0 -> Set[T1]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x1(x2) ⊂ lib(set_lattice).set_list_sSup[T1, T0](x0, x1) } = true } }
